title: Ichiban Kuji Natsume Yuujinchou: Nyanko-sensei to Hana Shirabe
titleRomaji: Ichiban Kuji Natsume Yuujinchou: Nyanko-sensei to Hana Shirabe
titleNative: 一番くじ 夏目友人帳 ニャンコ先生と花しらべ
synopsis: Kogitsune tells Nyanko-sensei the meanings of different flowers and assembles a bouquet as a gift for Natsume. Note: This ONA was a promotional video made for a Bandai Spirits Ichiban Kuji event which ran from March 19, 2021 at FamilyMart, Ministop, and other convenience stores, bookstores, hobby shops, and game centers. The theme is "The Language of Flowers". It had a lineup of stuffed animals, stoles, tote bags, brooches, stationery, handkerchiefs, and acrylic charms. Last drawn prize was a clover cushion.

title: Happy ComeCome
titleNative: ハッピーカムカム
synopsis: Hiroshi is tired of living alone so he orders a maid robot from a company called Happy Come Come, but ends up with the robot mom Yoshiko instead. Yoshiko acts more motherly than Hiroshi's real mother, and over time she is able to heal his heart. (Source: Anime News Network) Project by SynergySP announced to be part of Anime Mirai 2015.

title: Kao ni Denai Kashiwada-san to Kao ni Deru Oota-kun CM
titleRomaji: Kao ni Denai Kashiwada-san to Kao ni Deru Oota-kun CM
titleNative: 顔に出ない柏田さんと顔に出る太田君 CM
synonyms: Expressionless Kashiwada-san and Emotional Oota-kun CM
synopsis: A commercial for Fuyu Azuma's manga Kao ni Denai Kashiwada-san to Kao ni Deru Oota-kun , directed by Yui Kinoshita. Meet Kashiwada-san, a female middle-school student, who remains emotionless regardless of how she is meddled with. And Oota-kun, unable to control his facial expressions, is the complete opposite of Kashiwada-san--but he keeps messing with her, against his better judgment?!

title: Pikaia!
titleNative: ピカイア！
synopsis: The story begins in the future when Earth itself is no longer inhabitable by living creatures. Humans began their interstellar migration with space colonies. Vince and Hana work as researchers in the Cambrian Project. Together with the creature Pikaia, they seek the Lost Code, the key to restoring Earth, and aim to return to Cambrian-era Earth. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Mameneko
titleNative: まめねこ
synopsis: The daily life of a household that has two cats: Azuki and Daizu. Azuki and Daizu belong to an office worker in her 30s who loves cats. The owner lives with her father, mother, grandfather, and older brother, the latter of whom the cats call "Megane" (Glasses). Megane adopted a Shiba Inu dog named Mamenosuke after Mamenosuke's owner died. Mamenosuke grew up around cats so he actually thinks of himself as a cat. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: mofusand
titleNative: mofusand
synopsis: Shark Meow is an orange tabby kitty who wears a shark suit. A little clumsy and always taking things at their own cozy pace, but every day with their best kitty friends — and the rescued baby kitty, Little Meow — is filled with unexpected little mishaps and sweet adventures. A sunny warm spot in the park, the sparkle of the sea, steam rising from freshly roasted sweet potatoes, the fluttery feeling of the first snowfall… These small everyday moments fill their world with warmth and delight. You can’t help but smile and think, “So true!” A soft and snuggly kitty anime that brings joy to everyday moments. (Source: QTORY Channel)

title: Kira Kira Happy ★ Hirake! Cocotama
titleNative: キラキラハッピー★ひらけ！ここたま
synopsis: Long time ago, Haruka Hoshinogawa made a wish with the town's old cherry blossom tree with her grandfather while receiving a present from him: a cherry blossom ribbon. As she grew up, she treasured the gift that was given to her while starting fifth grade in her school. One day, upon noting that the old cherry blossom tree is wilting, her grandfather decided to leave the shop to explore the world and let Haruka take care of the store in his absence. The next day while sleeping, her treasured ribbon sprouted a strange egg, revealing a Cocotama, a god born from an object that has been cherished with love and care. Haruka woke up and accidentally saw the Cocotama on the table, retreated to her Hiding Egg. As Haruka picked it up, it has changed into a mysterious key. Left with some questions, the Cocotama introduced herself as Ribbon and Haruka learned about the existence of her kind and the mysteries behind the strange key she had. Ribbon realized that the key is actually the Key of Wonde

title: Sui Kin Chi Ka Moku Dotten Amen SP Dance PV
titleRomaji: Sui Kin Chi Ka Moku Dotten Amen SP Dance PV
titleNative: 水金地火木土天アーメン SPダンスPV
synonyms: Kimi no Iro Special Dance Video
The Colors Within Special Dance Video
きみの色 劇中歌「水金地火木土天アーメン」描き下ろしSPダンスPV
Amen I'm Going Somewhere Special Dance Video
synopsis: Naoko Yamada-directed anime film Kimi no Iro (The Colors Within) released a special "dance" video – though, it’s a little more on-beat for the creator who enjoys showcasing her characters goofing around and showing their personality through movement. The video contains wholly original footage, presented in a TikTok-like format and follows the three main characters, Kimi, Totsuko and Rui, dancing along to the insert song “Sui Kin Chi Ka Moku Dotten Amen” with moves that are reminiscent of those popular with those who upload short-form dance videos. (Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

Kenichi Akizuki and Misako Watanabe work together to solve the mysterious disappearance of their classmate Ryouko Miyazaki. The only clue left by the kidnapper is signed Koushin Okazaki, her late classmate who'd committed suicide to preserve his youth and become like Peter Pan.
